content.text:
All other files either forward events, pattern-match, or touch different variants. The evidence is clear.

## Construct sites

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: Constructs both `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallRequested { ... }` and `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallResult { ... }` inside `AgentLoop::run`, within the per-tool-call loop — `ToolCallRequested` is emitted just before dispatching each tool, and `ToolCallResult` is emitted immediately after with the outcome and output SHA.

No other file constructs either variant. The files that reference them all do so via pattern-matching only:
- `crates/orbit-engine/examples/v2_job_runtime_smoke.rs` — `filter_map` closure destructures both variants to extract `session_id`, but never synthesizes them.
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs` — match arm on `ToolCallRequested` to gate enforcement; constructs only `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial`.

result:
All other files either forward events, pattern-match, or touch different variants. The evidence is clear.

## Construct sites

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: Constructs both `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallRequested { ... }` and `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallResult { ... }` inside `AgentLoop::run`, within the per-tool-call loop — `ToolCallRequested` is emitted just before dispatching each tool, and `ToolCallResult` is emitted immediately after with the outcome and output SHA.

No other file constructs either variant. The files that reference them all do so via pattern-matching only:
- `crates/orbit-engine/examples/v2_job_runtime_smoke.rs` — `filter_map` closure destructures both variants to extract `session_id`, but never synthesizes them.
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs` — match arm on `ToolCallRequested` to gate enforcement; constructs only `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial`.
